key.name: floating
key.description: If true, show the back button as a draggable floating button; otherwise show it in the top panel.

key.name: panel-section
key.description: Panel box section where the button is shown when floating is disabled.

key.name: floating-opacity
key.description: Opacity of the floating button in percent.

key.name: floating-use-gnome-default-color
key.summary: Use GNOME default floating button color
key.description: If true, use the extension default GNOME-style color. If false, use the custom floating color value.

key.name: floating-color
key.description: Hex color used for the floating button background when GNOME default color is disabled.

key.name: swipe-left-action
key.description: Action executed when swiping left from the floating button.

key.name: swipe-up-action
key.description: Action executed when swiping up from the floating button.

key.name: swipe-down-action
key.description: Action executed when swiping down from the floating button.

key.name: swipe-right-action
key.description: Action executed when swiping right from the floating button.
